owns: which file is this and where did it come from (ISRC/UPC, provider IDs, content_sha256, fingerprint, file location, provenance)

sqlite.writer_policy: SINGLE WRITER = slut only, BY POLICY NOT MECHANISM. Audit 2026-07-02 F-014: three runnable hag scripts still write here; guard is absent in code pending R1.
sqlite.intake_from_hag: hag hands slut SQL or a payloads file; slut snapshots, validates, then applies (as with the 18,492 spotify_id aliases)

notes: Snapshot only. Durable history is handoffs/handoff.jsonl; locked decisions are DECISIONS_LOCKED (see README migration note).
